description: Synthetic calibration-candidate template only. Copy to .artifacts/diarization-fixtures/calibration-candidates.local.json before enabling candidates against private fixtures.

candidates.name: merge-more-conservatively
candidates.description: Raises cluster-merge similarity requirements to reduce accidental speaker collapse.
candidates.disabledReason: Example only. Enable in a private local copy after reviewing fixture evidence.

candidates.name: filter-tiny-speakers-more-aggressively
candidates.description: Raises the minimum supported speaker duration to reduce fragment-only speakers.
candidates.disabledReason: Example only. Enable in a private local copy after reviewing fixture evidence.

candidates.name: speaker-name-suggest-first
candidates.description: Keeps profile recognition conservative by making auto-apply harder while leaving suggestions available.
candidates.disabledReason: Example only. Enable in a private local copy after reviewing fixture evidence.
